title: Lesson 853: 余所, 四つ角, 酔っ払い...

to call out to; to hail; to address; to appeal
to summon; to call (e.g. phone); to convene; to decoy; to lure; to invoke (e.g. subroutine); to call; to open (e.g. a file)
